# cobbler_snippet (Data Source)

Use this data source to get the details of a Cobbler snippet.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the snippet.

### Read-Only

- `body` (String) The body of the snippet.
